services.name: wireguard-warp-proxy
entrypoint:
apk add --no-cache tinyproxy bash wireguard-tools && mkdir -p /custom-cont-init.d && cat > /custom-cont-init.d/99-proxy-fix.sh << 'INITSCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
echo "**** [WATCHDOG] Starting watchdog ****"
(
  while ! ip link show peer_cloudflare >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done
  echo "**** [WATCHDOG] Tunnel detected, applying network fix ****"
  GW=$(ip route show 0.0.0.0/0 dev eth0 | cut -d" " -f3)
  ip rule add to $LAN_SUBNET lookup main priority 1 2>/dev/null
  ip route add $LAN_SUBNET via $GW dev eth0 table main 2>/dev/null
  iptables -I INPUT -p tcp --dport 3128 -j ACCEPT 2>/dev/null
  echo "**** [WATCHDOG] LAN routing fixed ****"
) &
cat <<EOF > /etc/tinyproxy/tinyproxy.conf
User root
Port 3128
Listen 0.0.0.0
Allow 0.0.0.0/0
EOF
tinyproxy
INITSCRIPT
chmod +x /custom-cont-init.d/99-proxy-fix.sh && exec /init
